instName: ﻿Monastery of Our Lady of La Trappe
instNote: ﻿on a fine farm of 1700 acres of rich prarie land, the gift of the late saintly Bishop Loras. The Fathers attend to the spiritual wants of the people in the neighborhood of the Monastery. A free school is kept for the children of the locality.
